# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin_address : 0.0.0.0 # Admin UI Listening Address (default all interfaces)
port              :  8001    # Proxy listening port(env var STRICTLY INTEGER, default is a high value recommended to be dynamic). Can also specify the env variable PORT if required in different environments and containers.  Must use same for Envoy proxy as well (ENV VAR: `PORT`)
stats_address     :  0.0.0.0 # Stats Listening Address - can choose any IP/Domain Name here to access stats UI from outside the envoey instance, defaults all interfaces if not specified in code OR via STRICTLY INTEGER or ENV VAR PORT mentioned above (default is same as admin).
stats_port       : 9001    # Stats endpoint listening port. Defaults to a high value recommended and can be set by env variable STATS_PORT if required in different environments, defaults are the highest possible unless specified otherwise here or via STRICTLY INTEGER/ENV VAR PORT mentioned above (default is same as admin).
healthcheck : true # Enable health checks. Defaults to `true` and can be set by env variable HEALTHCHECK if required in different environments, defaults are the highest possible unless specified otherwise here or via STRICTLY INTEGER/ENV VAR PORT mentioned above (default is same as admin).
access_log      : false # Enable access logging. Defaults to `false` and can be set by env variable ACCESS_LOG if required in different environments, defaults are the highest possible unless specified otherwise here or via STRICTLY INTEGER/ENV VAR PORT mentioned above (default is same as admin).
